templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://sweethoneyclothing.com/collections/blowout-sale

templates.name: How do I use my rewards
templates.content:
Good question! 
Points that are earned in the SweetHoney Rewards program can be redeemed for various rewards. We currently offer discount vouchers ranging from $5 to $25, along with gift cards that range from $10 to $500. Discount vouchers will behave similarly to discount codes, and cannot be combined with existing discount codes.
Here is the link to the rewards page - https://sweethoney.attn.tv/aDrXUy6DcHJm
Please log into your account to see your points and redeem discount vouchers for them. 
I hope this helps.

templates.name: Why isn't free shipping available anymore?
templates.content: I'm afraid the promotion has ended for the time being. Please let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/sweethoneyclothing/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/SweetHoneyClothing/

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://sweethoneyclothing.com/collections/last-call

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@sweethoneyclothing.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at  support@sweethoneyclothing.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: So sorry it wasn't quite right! Check out our FAQ page here: https://sweethoneyclothing.com/pages/customer-support for info on the return process. When you're ready, please email our team at support@sweethoneyclothing.com and they'll get it taken care of as soon as possible!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at  support@sweethoneyclothing.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Post purchase issues
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out! Unfortunately, this issue can't be handled via text, but please send an email to support@sweethoneyclothing.com or open a ticket here: https://sweethoneyclothing.com/pages/customer-support and one of our reps will get you taken care of!

templates.name: Cancel/edit
templates.content: Please reach out to our customer support team at support@sweethoneyclothing.com for any questions or concerns regarding your order and changes needed.

templates.name: Do you have any discounts / sales / promos?
templates.content: You're more than welcome to try the code: WELCOME or THANKYOU at checkout if you haven't done so previously. Also, I recommend following our platforms closely for any sale or promotions that may become available in the future.

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend checking our website and social media frequently.

templates.name: Sizing / Do your items run true to size?
templates.content: The majority of our items fit true to size. If our design team has noted sizing recommendations outside of that norm, it'll be stated in the item description. You can also find the size chart on each product page. Let me know if you need help choosing the size.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Your order will be processed as soon as possible, and we do our best to fulfill the oldest orders first. Most orders ship within 2-5 business days from the time your order is received. Warehouse Sales, Site-Wide Sales, and other Seasonal Sales will ship within 5-8 business days from the time your order is received, if your order is customized the processing time is from 15-20 business days.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Do you offer local pick up?
templates.content: Our pick-up location is SweetHoney Warehouse, 605 E. US HWY 80, White Oak, TX 75693, and our pick-up hours are Monday - Friday from 9am to 3pm CST. We will not be able to fulfill your order before or after this time, and please allow 2 hours for us to fulfill your order. You will receive an email once your order is ready for pickup with steps and instructions to pickup your items. We will hold your order for three business days once the order is placed. If the item isn't picked up within three business days you will be refunded.

templates.name: Do you offer embroidery?
templates.content: We offer embroidery/customization options for a selection of our products. Please note that products that have been customized are considered 'final sale' and cannot be returned, refunded, or exchanged. Font options and placements have been carefully selected on a per-product basis to ensure that your product turns out as beautifully as possible. You can find more details on the customization process here: https://sweethoneyclothing.com/pages/embroidery

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are unable to honor promotions if the order is not placed within the timeframe the promotion was being offered.
